title: Add Resume Makinator to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Resume Makinator](https://rm.mkgpdev.xyz) to build
- Resume Makinator is a free browser-based resume builder that lets users edit structured resume sections, preview the result live, and export their resume. It integrates Pollinations.ai through the Cha

Fixes #10424

gist.headline: Get a job, pixel by pixel
gist.blurb: Resume Makinator just landed in the community greenhouse. It's a browser-based builder that uses our text models to help you write, preview, and export a resume that might actually get read.
gist.summary: Added Resume Makinator, a free browser-based resume builder integrating Pollinations.ai for text generation, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Resume Makinator in the apps directory to build, live-preview, and export structured resumes.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working on a resume together. The robot displays a structured document on its screen, while Polly wears a tiny professional tie. Cozy desk environment with plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny necktie, reviewing a pixelated resume document with the chunky Monitor Robot. The robot's screen glows lime green (#ecf874) showing structured text blocks. A cozy wooden desk with small code-plants in pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

The robot's screen glows lime green (#ecf874) showing structured text blocks. A cozy wooden desk with small code-plants in pots.
